prompt: Create a high-resolution vertical art print on a clean white background, centered on a glossy traditional Japanese Fukusuke lucky doll in a formal kneeling bow pose with both hands placed on the floor in front. The doll wears an ornate dark navy and black kimono with vivid embroidered floral and phoenix-like motifs, bright royal-blue dotted collar panels, red and white trim, green inner lining, and small white plum-blossom family crests on both sleeves. The head has a shaved turquoise-blue crown with black side hair and a small black topknot, but the face is deliberately hidden by one large opaque rectangular censor block filled with a soft vertical gradient from pale blue at the top through beige to muted mauve at the bottom. Behind the figure, add a dramatic symmetrical optical halftone aura made of dense black dotted contour waves, with subtle cyan, magenta, yellow, and green chromatic offset glitches tracing the silhouette and radiating outward like a digital vibration field. Use hyper-detailed glossy ceramic/plastic texture, sharp studio lighting, saturated colors, crisp edges, and a surreal contemporary AI-art aesthetic. Include exactly one main doll, one censor rectangle, two visible hands, two visible ears, two sleeve crests, and one small bottom-right artist signature area with the date May 14, 2026 above a loose cursive signature Oyagi. The main subject should resemble a traditional Japanese Fukusuke lucky doll; keep the face completely obscured by the rectangle, with no readable facial features visible.
